🌊 Swell: 4.2m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h ESE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Very large swell - experienced surfers only • Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves
